title: marsdenia dregea
intro: Marsdenia dregea, also known as the Yellow Milk Vine, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits associated with Marsdenia dregea include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Marsdenia dregea is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its extracts are also used in modern medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
